languages.text: {n}Ведка бледнеет и подносит здоровую руку к отсутствующему глазу. Черный камень в глазнице, кажется, чуть движется.{/n} "Да, Ваша Светлость. Я была молода и хотела во время Тренировочного боя за звание капитан-интенданта доказать свою доблесть и бесстрашие. Взяла побольше взрыв-пыльцы и пошла к тем руинам. Хотела их взорвать, чтобы показать удаль и что мы никаких ксеносов не боимся".

{n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness, during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка бледнеет и подносит здоровую руку к отсутствующему глазу. Черный камень в глазнице, кажется, чуть движется.{/n} "Да, Ваша Светлость. Я была молода и хотела во время Тренировочного боя за звание капитан-интенданта доказать свою доблесть и бесстрашие. Взяла побольше взрыв-пыльцы и пошла к тем руинам. Хотела их взорвать, чтобы показать удаль и что мы никаких ксеносов не боимся".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her living hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your Lordship. I was young and eager, during the Trial of Combat for the rank of Captain-Quartermaster, to prove my valour and fearlessness. I took a great quantity of blasting powder and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

languages.text: {n}薇德卡面色一白，用那只血肉之手捂住缺失的眼窝，嵌在其中的黑色石头似乎微微颤动了一下。{/n}“是的，大人。那时我还年轻，一心只想证明自己的勇猛无畏。那是在争夺军需官上尉之位的试炼比武上，我带了大量爆炸花粉，去了那片遗迹。我本打算把它们炸掉，以展示我的胆魄，证明我们对异形无所畏惧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness , during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡面色一白，用那只血肉之手捂住缺失的眼窝，嵌在其中的黑色石头似乎微微颤动了一下。{/n}“是的，大人。那时我还年轻，一心只想证明自己的勇猛无畏。那是在争夺军需官上尉之位的试炼比武上，我带了大量爆炸花粉，去了那片遗迹。我本打算把它们炸掉，以展示我的胆魄，证明我们对异形无所畏惧。”

languages.text: {n}Vedka sararıyor, kanlı elini eksik gözüne götürüyor. Göz çukurundaki kara taş, çok hafifçe hareket ediyormuş gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gençtim ve Levazımcı Yüzbaşı mevkisi için Sınav Karşılaşması'nda cesaretimi ve korkusuzluğumu kanıtlamaya hevesliydim. Çok miktarda patlayıcı polen alıp o harabelere gittim. Onları havaya uçurmayı, cesaretimi ve hiçbir zenodan korkmadığımızı göstermeyi planlıyordum."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness , during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

Gençtim ve Levazımcı Yüzbaşı mevkisi için Sınav Karşılaşması'nda cesaretimi ve korkusuzluğumu kanıtlamaya hevesliydim. Çok miktarda patlayıcı polen alıp o harabelere gittim. Onları havaya uçurmayı, cesaretimi ve hiçbir zenodan korkmadığımızı göstermeyi planlıyordum."

languages.text: {n}Vedka blêmit et touche son œil aveugle de sa main de chair. La pierre noire fichée dans l'orbite semble remuer légèrement.{/n} « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie. J'étais jeune et je cherchais à me distinguer lors de l'Épreuve par les armes pour le grade de capitaine-quartier-maître. Je me suis rendue aux ruines en emportant une grande quantité de pollen explosif. Je comptais les faire sauter pour prouver ma valeur et ma témérité, tout en montrant que nous ne craignions aucun xénos. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness , during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka blêmit et touche son œil aveugle de sa main de chair. La pierre noire fichée dans l'orbite semble remuer légèrement.{/n} « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie. J'étais jeune et je cherchais à me distinguer lors de l'Épreuve par les armes pour le grade de capitaine-quartier-maître. Je me suis rendue aux ruines en emportant une grande quantité de pollen explosif. Je comptais les faire sauter pour prouver ma valeur et ma témérité, tout en montrant que nous ne craignions aucun xénos. »

languages.text: {n}Vedka palidece y se lleva la mano de carne y hueso al ojo que le falta. La piedra negra que ocupa la cuenca parece moverse ligeramente.{/n} «Así es, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Era joven y ardía en deseos de demostrar mi valor y coraje. Durante la prueba de combate por el rango de capitana-intendente, llevé una gran cantidad de polen explosivo a las ruinas. Tenía intención de volarlas para demostrar mi coraje y que no teníamos miedo a ningún xenos».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness , during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka palidece y se lleva la mano de carne y hueso al ojo que le falta. La piedra negra que ocupa la cuenca parece moverse ligeramente.{/n} «Así es, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Era joven y ardía en deseos de demostrar mi valor y coraje. Durante la prueba de combate por el rango de capitana-intendente, llevé una gran cantidad de polen explosivo a las ruinas. Tenía intención de volarlas para demostrar mi coraje y que no teníamos miedo a ningún xenos».

languages.text: {n}Vedka erblasst und fasst sich mit ihrer intakten Hand an ihr fehlendes Auge. Der schwarze Stein im Inneren der Augenhöhle scheint sich minimal zu bewegen.{/n} "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich war jung und wollte während des Prüfungskampfes um die Position der Captain-Quartiermeisterin meinen Wert und meine Furchtlosigkeit unter Beweis stellen. Also besorgte ich mir reichlich Sprengpollen und ging zu diesen Ruinen. Ich wollte sie in die Luft jagen, um zu beweisen, dass wir keine Xenos fürchten."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness , during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."

Der schwarze Stein im Inneren der Augenhöhle scheint sich minimal zu bewegen.{/n} "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich war jung und wollte während des Prüfungskampfes um die Position der Captain-Quartiermeisterin meinen Wert und meine Furchtlosigkeit unter Beweis stellen. Also besorgte ich mir reichlich Sprengpollen und ging zu diesen Ruinen. Ich wollte sie in die Luft jagen, um zu beweisen, dass wir keine Xenos fürchten."

languages.text:
{n}ヴェドカは顔を白くし、欠けた目の場所に手を当てた。眼窩の中の黒い石が、わずかに動いたように見える。{/n}
「ええ、御{mf|殿|女}様。私は若く、勇気と無敵の証明をしたいと、大尉候補の試験試合で、大量の爆薬花粉を携え、その廃墟に向かった。大胆さを示し、異種族を恐れぬことを証明するためだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka pales, bringing her flesh-and-blood hand to her missing eye. The black stone within the socket seems to shift, ever so slightly.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I was young and eager to prove my valour and fearlessness, during the Trial Match for the rank of captain-quartermaster. I took a large quantity of explosive pollen and went to those ruins. I intended to blow them up, to show my daring and that we feared no xenos."
